name: com.brassworks.sidecar.steam-lighting-fixture-set12
displayName: Brassworks Breach Steam Lighting Fixture Set 12
description: Isolated Unity-only sidecar package for high-fidelity brass/iron steampunk corridor lighting fixtures: caged gaslights, hanging lanterns, inspection lamps, gauge-mounted lamp brackets, glowing pipe brackets, switch boxes, soot halos, procedural materials, textures, meshes, prefabs, and concept renders.

samples.description: Import-safe notes for the Steam Lighting Fixture Set 12 sidecar package.
